tasks.title: Fix DiffResult struct
tasks.description: Add `passed: bool` field computed from `total_diffs == 0`. Add `expected: Buffer` field storing expected buffer reference. Add `actual: Buffer` field storing actual buffer reference. Update `diff()` method to populate these fields. Update `Display` impl.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify DiffResult.passed returns true when total_diffs == 0
AddUnitTest: verify DiffResult.passed returns false when total_diffs > 0
AddUnitTest: verify DiffResult.expected contains reference to expected Buffer
AddUnitTest: verify DiffResult.actual contains reference to actual Buffer
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing BufferDiff tests still pass
tasks.impl_notes: Add passed field as computed property from total_diffs == 0. Store Buffer references instead of copying data for memory efficiency.

tasks.title: Fix CellDiff struct
tasks.description: Refactor to use `expected: Cell` and `actual: Cell` instead of individual fields. Keep x and y for position. Maintain backward compatibility via helper methods. Update Display impl for human-readable output.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify CellDiff uses ratatui::buffer::Cell type for expected/actual
AddUnitTest: verify position (x, y) is still accessible
AddUnitTest: verify human-readable diff output is maintained in Display impl
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing CellDiff tests still pass
tasks.impl_notes: Use ratatui::buffer::Cell directly. Provide helper methods like symbol() for backward compatibility.

tasks.title: Add assert_buffer_eq to TestDsl
tasks.description: Add `assert_buffer_eq(&self, expected: &Buffer, actual: &Buffer) -> Result<()>`. Use internal BufferDiff for comparison. Return detailed error with diff info on failure.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify assert_buffer_eq accepts two Buffer parameters
AddUnitTest: verify assert_buffer_eq returns Ok(()) when buffers are identical
AddUnitTest: verify assert_buffer_eq returns error with diff details when different
AddIntegrationTest: verify assert_buffer_eq works with TestDsl fluent chaining
tasks.impl_notes: Use internal BufferDiff for comparison. Return Err with formatted diff output on failure.

tasks.title: Implement diff_str method
tasks.description: Add `diff_str(expected: &str, actual: &str) -> DiffResult`. Parse string input into Buffer format. Return DiffResult directly (not wrapped in Result).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify diff_str accepts string inputs
AddUnitTest: verify diff_str returns DiffResult with passed: true for identical content
AddUnitTest: verify diff_str returns DiffResult with passed: false for different content
AddUnitTest: verify diff_str parses multi-line strings correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Parse string into Buffer format. Return DiffResult directly without Result wrapping.

tasks.title: Add send_keys method
tasks.description: Add `send_keys(&mut self, keys: &str) -> Result<&mut Self>`. Parse key sequences (enter, escape, ctrl-x, etc.). Return `&mut Self` for fluent chaining. Internally uses PTY for injection.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify send_keys accepts string keys input
AddUnitTest: verify send_keys returns &mut Self for fluent chaining
AddUnitTest: verify send_keys parses common key sequences (enter, escape)
AddUnitTest: verify send_keys parses ctrl-x style sequences
AddIntegrationTest: verify keys are injected via PTY correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Parse key sequences like 'enter', 'escape', 'ctrl-c', 'ctrl-x'. Return mutable reference for method chaining.

tasks.title: PtySimulator new() alignment
tasks.description: Add `new()` as alias that creates a default PTY. Uses `new(&["bash", "-c", "echo ready"])` or similar. Or update PRD to reflect actual `new(command: &[&str])` signature.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify PtySimulator::new() works without arguments OR
AddUnitTest: verify documentation reflects new(command: &[&str]) signature
tasks.impl_notes: Add new() with no args that creates default bash -c 'echo ready' PTY for convenience.

tasks.title: Create tests/buffer_diff_tests.rs
tasks.description: Comprehensive BufferDiff tests. CellDiff tests with Cell type. diff_str tests. Approximately 200 lines.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify file created at tests/buffer_diff_tests.rs
AddUnitTest: verify BufferDiff comparison tests
AddUnitTest: verify CellDiff tests with ratatui::buffer::Cell type
AddUnitTest: verify diff_str tests
RunTestSuite: execute tests/buffer_diff_tests.rs to ensure all pass

tasks.title: Create snapshot.rs module
tasks.description: Create `src/snapshot.rs` module. Add `load_snapshot(name: &str) -> Result<Buffer>`. Add `save_snapshot(name: &str, buffer: &Buffer) -> Result<()>`. Organized directory structure for snapshots.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify src/snapshot.rs module is created
AddUnitTest: verify load_snapshot(name: &str) returns Result<Buffer>
AddUnitTest: verify save_snapshot(name: &str, buffer: &Buffer) returns Result<()>
AddUnitTest: verify snapshots are stored in organized directory structure
RunTestSuite: ensure snapshot module tests pass
tasks.impl_notes: Create snapshot module with load and save functions. Use organized directory structure for snapshot files.

tasks.title: Integrate snapshot with TestDsl
tasks.description: Add `save_snapshot()` method to TestDsl. Add `load_snapshot()` method to TestDsl. Support snapshot naming and versioning.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify TestDsl::save_snapshot() method works
AddUnitTest: verify TestDsl::load_snapshot() method works
AddIntegrationTest: verify fluent API chaining works with snapshot methods
RunTestSuite: ensure integration tests pass
tasks.impl_notes: Add snapshot methods to TestDsl for fluent API. Support naming and versioning in snapshots.
